detail.description: Andrés Chaparro singles on a ground ball to shortstop José Caballero.
Andrés Chaparro singles on a ground ball to shortstop Trea Turner.
Andrés Chaparro doubles (3) on a fly ball to left fielder Luke Raley.
Andrés Chaparro doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Nick Castellanos. Nasim Nuñez scores. James Wood to 3rd.
Andrés Chaparro homers (3) on a line drive to left field. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead scores.

Andrés Chaparro singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead scores. Andrés Chaparro to 2nd. Andrés Chaparro advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Henry Bolte.
Andrés Chaparro homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Curtis Mead scores.
Andrés Chaparro singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Curtis Mead scores.
Andrés Chaparro singles on a fly ball to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.
Andrés Chaparro doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Matt Shaw.
Andrés Chaparro homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead scores.
Andrés Chaparro homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field. Curtis Mead scores.

Andrés Chaparro singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Andrés Chaparro out at 2nd on the throw, left fielder Chandler Simpson to shortstop Taylor Walls to second baseman Richie Palacios. Curtis Mead to 3rd.

Andrés Chaparro singles on a line drive to left fielder Steven Kwan. Nasim Nuñez scores. James Wood scores. Andrés Chaparro out at 2nd on the throw, left fielder Steven Kwan to second baseman Travis Bazzana.
